'''âh-v-zh''' ('''kahavazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whoom|whoom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whoom|whoom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kahavazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihavazh|thihavazh]] || [[word:jihavazh|jihavazh]] || [[word:shihavazh|shihavazh]] || [[word:kihavazh|kihavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhavazh|thuthuhavazh]] || [[word:jujuhavazh|jujuhavazh]] || [[word:shushuhavazh|shushuhavazh]] || [[word:kukuhavazh|kukuhavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhavazh|thuhavazh]] || [[word:juhavazh|juhavazh]] || [[word:shuhavazh|shuhavazh]] || [[word:kuhavazh|kuhavazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhavazh|thuhavazh]] || [[word:juhavazh|juhavazh]] || [[word:shuhavazh|shuhavazh]] || [[word:kuhavazh|kuhavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehavazh|thehavazh]] || [[word:jehavazh|jehavazh]] || [[word:shehavazh|shehavazh]] || [[word:kehavazh|kehavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohavazh|thothohavazh]] || [[word:jojohavazh|jojohavazh]] || [[word:shoshohavazh|shoshohavazh]] || [[word:kokohavazh|kokohavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohavazh|thohavazh]] || [[word:johavazh|johavazh]] || [[word:shohavazh|shohavazh]] || [[word:kohavazh|kohavazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohavazh|thohavazh]] || [[word:johavazh|johavazh]] || [[word:shohavazh|shohavazh]] || [[word:kohavazh|kohavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhavazh|thĂŠhavazh]] || [[word:jĂŠhavazh|jĂŠhavazh]] || [[word:shĂŠhavazh|shĂŠhavazh]] || [[word:kĂŠhavazh|kĂŠhavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahavazh|thathahavazh]] || [[word:jajahavazh|jajahavazh]] || [[word:shashahavazh|shashahavazh]] || [[word:kakahavazh|kakahavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahavazh|thahavazh]] || [[word:jahavazh|jahavazh]] || [[word:shahavazh|shahavazh]] || [[word:kahavazh|kahavazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahavazh|thahavazh]] || [[word:jahavazh|jahavazh]] || [[word:shahavazh|shahavazh]] || [[word:kahavazh|kahavazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahavazh|shahavazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahavazh|goshahavazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahavazh|gokishahavazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahavazhnĂŒ|shahavazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahavazhnknĂŒ|goshahavazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavazhnĂŒ|gokishahavazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahavazhshĂ«|shahavazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkshĂ«|goshahavazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahavazhshĂ«|gokishahavazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavazhro|shahavazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkro|goshahavazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavazhro|gokishahavazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavazhmu|shahavazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkmu|goshahavazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavazhmu|gokishahavazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahavazhsher|shahavazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahavazhnksher|goshahavazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahavazhsher|gokishahavazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahavazhng|shahavazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkng|goshahavazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahavazhng|gokishahavazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahavazhya|shahavazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkya|goshahavazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahavazhya|gokishahavazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahavazhyam|shahavazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkyam|goshahavazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahavazhyam|gokishahavazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahavazhnĂŒshĂ«|shahavazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahavazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahavazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahavazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahavazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavazhnĂŒro|shahavazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavazhnknĂŒro|goshahavazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavazhnĂŒro|gokishahavazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavazhnĂŒmu|shahavazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavazhnknĂŒmu|goshahavazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavazhnĂŒmu|gokishahavazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahavazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shahavazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahavazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahavazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavazhshĂ«ro|shahavazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkshĂ«ro|goshahavazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavazhshĂ«ro|gokishahavazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavazhshĂ«mu|shahavazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkshĂ«mu|goshahavazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavazhshĂ«mu|gokishahavazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahavazhronĂŒ|shahavazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkronĂŒ|goshahavazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavazhronĂŒ|gokishahavazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahavazhroshĂ«|shahavazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkroshĂ«|goshahavazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahavazhroshĂ«|gokishahavazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahavazhromu|shahavazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkromu|goshahavazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahavazhromu|gokishahavazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahavazhmunĂŒ|shahavazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkmunĂŒ|goshahavazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahavazhmunĂŒ|gokishahavazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahavazhmushĂ«|shahavazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkmushĂ«|goshahavazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahavazhmushĂ«|gokishahavazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahavazhmuro|shahavazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahavazhnkmuro|goshahavazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahavazhmuro|gokishahavazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
